content: K8s convention: small validated config inline in CRD spec; large/variable text via ConfigMap/Secret key selector reference (valueFrom-style union with mutual exclusion, e.g. kubevirt userData vs userDataSecretRef, Grafana operator dashboard json vs configMapRef vs url). etcd 1.5MiB object limit and ConfigMap 1MiB limit bound both. CLI-side file expansion (read file, inline into spec at apply time) is also common (kubectl create configmap --from-file analogue).
